name: product_showcase_video_10s
description: Premium Suede Labs product video producer for agents and brands that need a longer 10-second product showcase from one image. Creates extended AI image-to-video ads with more room for detail, camera movement, feature emphasis, luxury styling, and social-ready presentation. Best for high-value ecommerce products, landing-page hero media, paid ads, founder launches, fashion, beauty, hardware, collectibles, crypto projects, AI apps, music merchandise, investor demos, and autonomous x402/ACP agent commerce workflows.

image_url.description: Public HTTP(S) URL of the product image to animate. Use the clearest product image available.

prompt.description: Optional direction for camera path, lighting, environment, pacing, product positioning, and brand tone.
examples: orbit around product with dramatic lighting, premium black studio, subtle reflections
slow zoom with luxury feel, clean white background, soft shadows, polished ecommerce style

examples.prompt: A 10-second premium showcase with slow orbit, dramatic light sweep, detailed close-up, and polished launch-video feel
